ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline - June 30
ham.body:
Dear Students,

This is a gentle reminder that the deadline for submitting the semester project reports is on June 30, 2024. Please ensure that your submissions are uploaded to the university portal by 11:59 PM IST. Late submissions will be penalized as per the grading policy.

For any queries, feel free to reach out to your project supervisor.

Best regards,

Prof. A. Sharma
Department of Computer Science
University of Delhi
Email: a.sharma@du.ac.in

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Your Zoom Meeting Invitation Update
spam.body:
Hello [Name],

We have detected a scheduled Zoom meeting scheduled for 3:00 PM IST tomorrow, titled "Project Review – Q2 Deliverables". Due to recent changes in our compliance policy, you must confirm your attendance within 24 hours to avoid automatic cancellation. Please click the link below to verify your details and accept the meeting invite:

<URL>

If you do not confirm, your account will be temporarily suspended, and you may lose access to your scheduled meetings.

Regards,

John Doe
Compliance Officer, XYZ Corp
Email: john.doe@xyz.com
Phone: +91-9876543210
